source_note: Screening recommendations follow USPSTF (2021-2024 updates), WHO PEN, and Kemenkes PTM guidance.

screenings.name: Blood Pressure Check
screenings.why: Hypertension is symptomless and the single largest risk factor for stroke and heart disease.

screenings.name: Cholesterol (Lipid Panel)
screenings.why: Detects high LDL cholesterol early, when diet or statins can still prevent heart attacks.
screenings.frequency: Every 4-6 years; yearly if abnormal or diabetic

screenings.name: Blood Sugar (HbA1c / Fasting Glucose)
screenings.why: Type 2 diabetes develops silently for years; early detection prevents organ damage.

screenings.name: Cervical Cancer Screening (Pap / HPV test)
screenings.why: Cervical cancer is among the most preventable cancers — Indonesia has one of the highest burdens in Asia.
screenings.frequency: Pap every 3 years, or HPV test every 5 years (age 30+)

screenings.name: Mammogram (Breast Cancer Screening)
screenings.why: Biennial mammography from age 40 significantly reduces breast cancer mortality.

screenings.name: Colorectal Cancer Screening
screenings.why: Colonoscopy or annual FIT stool test detects cancer at its most curable stage.
screenings.frequency: Colonoscopy every 10 years, or FIT yearly

screenings.name: Lung Cancer Screening (Low-dose CT)
screenings.why: For smokers and former smokers, annual low-dose CT catches lung cancer early enough to treat.
screenings.frequency: Every year while smoking history applies

screenings.name: Hepatitis B & C Screening
screenings.why: Indonesia is a high-prevalence region; most carriers don't know. One blood test, once.
screenings.frequency: At least once as an adult

screenings.name: HIV Screening
screenings.why: Recommended at least once for all adults — modern treatment makes early detection life-saving.
screenings.frequency: At least once; yearly if at risk

screenings.name: Bone Density Scan (DEXA)
screenings.why: Osteoporosis screening prevents the hip fractures that often end independent living.

screenings.name: Prostate Check (PSA — discuss with doctor)
screenings.why: PSA screening is a personal decision; discuss benefits and harms with your doctor.

screenings.name: Diabetic Eye Exam (Retinopathy)
screenings.why: Diabetes is the leading cause of preventable blindness — annual retina checks catch it in time.

screenings.name: Kidney Function (eGFR + Urine Albumin)
screenings.why: Diabetes and hypertension silently damage kidneys; early detection slows progression dramatically.

screenings.name: Tuberculosis Screening
screenings.why: Indonesia has the world's second-highest TB burden; screening matters for immunocompromised patients.

screenings.name: Abdominal Aortic Aneurysm Ultrasound
screenings.why: One-time ultrasound for men 65+ who have ever smoked — a ruptured aneurysm is usually fatal.
